description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, domed top and slightly irregular sides, suggesting a homemade or rustic style. The cake is covered in a uniform layer of icing, with no visible decorations or embellishments. Two thin, vertical candles are positioned at the center of the cake, adding a celebratory touch. The surface appears matte and soft, typical of buttercream or whipped cream frosting. The cake sits directly on a flat surface, with no visible plate or stand. Its overall appearance is simple and unadorned, focusing on the classic shape and the presence of candles.
description: A round, single-tier cake with smooth icing and two candles on top, presented in a plain, rustic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round cake with a domed top and two candles visible at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cake's height and the two vertical candles protruding from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the round shape and domed top, with candles faintly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the cake's profile and the two candles extending upward.
